layers.name: Silicon etch 2 negative
layers.description: [WGN] GDS 03 – Silicon etch 2 negative (waveguide – Writes waveguide border, standard width: 5 µm)

layers.name: Silicon etch 2 positive
layers.description: [WGP] GDS 04 – Silicon etch 2 positive (writes exactly as drawn, together with GDS 03, e.g. for metrology box)

layers.name: Silicon etch 3
layers.description: [FET] GDS 05 – Silicon etch 3 (full etch slab to BOX)

layers.name: Vias to heater filaments
layers.description: [HVI] GDS 15 - Vias to encapsulated heater filaments

layers.name: Defect Detector implantation window
layers.description: [DEF] GDS 23 – Defect Detector - Si implantation window

layers.name: ~100um deep etch for edge couplers
layers.description: [EDG] GDS 26 - ~100um deep etch for edge couplers
